caption: A woman with blonde-tipped dreadlocks tied up and wearing black headphones sits in a recording studio, facing slightly to her left. She is dressed in a black t-shirt and maintains a smile as she looks toward an unseen person. In front of her is a professional black microphone on a stand. The background consists of a white wall with a yellow vertical stripe and a black acoustic panel. A screen to the left displays the name "Johnson" in red text. A logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears as an overlay on the bottom left and right of the scene. Small white text below the right-side logo reads "by 11 Logo Studio". Throughout the sequence, the woman's expression remains consistent, with very slight changes in her head position and smile as she listens and reacts.
